category: Aldehyde dehydrogenase inhibitor / metal‑dependent anticancer repurposing agent

additional_notes: Often studied with copper for anticancer effects; reported antiproliferative effects in leukemia models per source text. No test concentrations provided in source text.

mechanism: Modulates NF‑κB and mitochondrial pathways leading to antiproliferative effects (exact anticancer mechanism multifactorial)

mechanism: Multi‑target effects (Wnt, STAT3, mTOR inhibition and mitochondrial uncoupling) that can impair cancer cell survival
